name: Keap
shortDescription: Integrate [Keap](https://keap.com) (formerly Infusionsoft) CRM, e-commerce and marketing automation into FlowRunner. This service wraps the Keap REST v1 API for contacts, tags, companies, opportunities, orders, products, notes, tasks and campaigns, plus a realtime trigger driven by Keap REST Hooks.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Creates a new contact in Keap. Supply names, one or more email addresses (each with a field slot such as EMAIL1), phone numbers, company, addresses and custom field values. Use Duplicate Option to instead upsert (merge into an existing contact) when an email or name matches.

actions.name: Get Contact
actions.description: Retrieves a single contact by ID, including names, email addresses, phone numbers, company, addresses, tags and custom fields.

actions.name: List Contacts
actions.description: Lists contacts with optional email and given-name filters. Supports paging with limit (max 1000) and offset. Returns a `contacts` array plus a `count` of total matches.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Updates an existing contact by ID. Only the fields you supply are changed. Names, primary email/phone, company, address and custom fields can all be updated.

actions.name: Delete Contact
actions.description: Permanently deletes a contact by ID. This cannot be undone.

actions.name: List Tags
actions.description: Lists tags defined in the Keap account. Supports paging with limit and offset. Returns a `tags` array and a total `count`.

actions.name: Create Tag
actions.description: Creates a new tag. Optionally place it in a tag category by ID.

actions.name: Apply Tag to Contact
actions.description: Applies one or more tags to a contact. Pass the contact ID and a list of tag IDs.

actions.name: Remove Tag from Contact
actions.description: Removes a single tag from a contact.

actions.name: Create Company
actions.description: Creates a new company record. The company name is required; email, phone, website and address are optional.

actions.name: Get Company
actions.description: Retrieves a single company by ID.

actions.name: List Companies
actions.description: Lists companies with an optional company-name filter and paging via limit and offset.

actions.name: Update Company
actions.description: Updates an existing company by ID. Only supplied fields are changed.

actions.name: Create Opportunity
actions.description: Creates a sales opportunity linked to a contact and placed in a pipeline stage. Title, contact ID and stage ID are required; user (owner) and projected revenue are optional.

actions.name: Get Opportunity
actions.description: Retrieves a single opportunity by ID, including its contact, stage and projected revenue.

actions.name: List Opportunities
actions.description: Lists opportunities with optional stage-ID and user-ID filters and paging via limit and offset.

actions.name: Update Opportunity
actions.description: Updates an existing opportunity by ID. Only supplied fields are changed; commonly used to move an opportunity to a new stage.

actions.name: List Orders
actions.description: Lists e-commerce orders with optional contact-ID filter, paid/unpaid filter, and paging via limit and offset.

actions.name: Get Order
actions.description: Retrieves a single order by ID, including line items, totals and payment status.

actions.name: List Products
actions.description: Lists products in the Keap store. Optionally include inactive products. Supports paging via limit and offset.

actions.name: Create Note
actions.description: Creates a note attached to a contact. Provide a title, body and note type (Call, Email, Fax, Letter, Other).

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Creates a task, optionally linked to a contact and given a due date. Provide a title and optional description.

actions.name: List Tasks
actions.description: Lists tasks with optional contact-ID filter, completion status filter, and paging via limit and offset.

actions.name: List Campaigns
actions.description: Lists marketing campaigns in the Keap account. Supports paging via limit and offset. Returns a `campaigns` array and total `count`.

idealUseCases: Sync new contacts and companies into Keap from web forms, spreadsheets or other CRMs.
Automate tagging to drive Keap campaigns and follow-up sequences.
Track a sales pipeline by creating opportunities and advancing them through stages.
React in real time when a contact, opportunity, order or task changes in Keap.
agentIdeas: When an **On Keap Event** "Contact Added" trigger fires, use **Gmail** "Send Message" to send the new contact a personalized welcome email.
Use **Google Sheets** "Get Rows" to read a lead list, then call **Keap** "Create Contact" and "Apply Tag to Contact" to import and segment each lead into the right campaign.
When an **On Keap Event** "Order Added" trigger fires, use **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to notify the sales team with the order and contact details.
